metadata.description: shuck plugins: failing-CI-log inspection tools and the self-hosted event-router channel shim

plugins.name: shuck
plugins.description: Failing CI step logs, PR reviews, security alerts, compliance and Dependabot audits, and Action/image SHA-pinning via the shuck CLI: a skill, an MCP server, and a prereq-checking hook.

plugins.name: shuck-channel
plugins.description: Channel shim for shuck's self-hosted event router: pushes distilled CI-failure and PR events from your shuck gateway into the session. Requires an operator-deployed gateway and a minted token; inert without them.
